sentences.arabic: كَانَ السُّوقُ الْقَدِيمُ مَكَانًا مُزْدَحِمًا وَصَاخِبًا.
sentences.translation: Stara tržnica bila je gužvovito i bučno mjesto.
sentences.translationEn: The old market was a busy and noisy place.

sentences.translation: Ljudi su prodavali voće, povrće i tkanine.
sentences.translationEn: People sold fruits, vegetables, and fabrics.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْجَمِيعُ يَتَكَلَّمُ بِصَوْتٍ عَالٍ فِي السُّوقِ.
sentences.translation: Svi su govorili glasno na tržnici.
sentences.translationEn: Everyone spoke loudly in the market.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ الْأَطْفَالُ يُحِبُّونَ الذَّهَابَ إِلَى السُّوقِ.
sentences.translation: Djeca su voljela ići na tržnicu.
sentences.translationEn: The children loved going to the market.
